paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!

raw_extraction.innovation: StarCoderBase is trained on a large-scale, permissively licensed dataset from The Stack with 8K context length, infilling capabilities via Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM), and fast large-batch inference enabled by Multi-Query-Attention (MQA)
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: The Stack (1 trillion tokens from 80+ programming languages, GitHub issues, Git commits, Jupyter notebooks)
raw_extraction.application: Code generation, code understanding, code completion, code translation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Development of open-access, safe, and responsible large language models for code
raw_extraction.extension: Infilling capabilities through Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM) and fast large-batch inference via Multi-Query-Attention (MQA)
raw_extraction.paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!

raw_extraction.innovation: StarCoder is a fine-tuned version of StarCoderBase, trained on 35B Python tokens, achieving superior performance on Python-specific tasks while maintaining strong cross-language capabilities
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: The Stack (1 trillion tokens from 80+ programming languages, GitHub issues, Git commits, Jupyter notebooks)
raw_extraction.application: Code generation, code understanding, code completion, code translation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Development of open-access, safe, and responsible large language models for code
raw_extraction.extension: Fine-tuned on 35B Python tokens to enhance performance on Python-specific tasks
